target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible destruction of facade and windows across multiple floors; structural elements appear intact but non-load-bearing components are extensively damaged; consistent with 45-75% area damage per doctrinal definition.

summary: One building assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE (PROBABLE confidence) across multiple floors, showing extensive facade and window destruction while structural elements appear intact. The overall scene depicts a large, multi-story building with widespread window loss and facade damage, suggesting abandonment or post-conflict conditions. The likely functional impact is complete loss of habitation or operational use for the affected structure.
